_comment: FlowOS Kafka Topic Definitions. All topics use 12 partitions for horizontal scalability. Retention is set per topic based on operational requirements.

topics.name: flowos.workflow.events
topics.description: Lifecycle events for workflows: WORKFLOW_CREATED, WORKFLOW_STARTED, WORKFLOW_PAUSED, WORKFLOW_RESUMED, WORKFLOW_COMPLETED, WORKFLOW_FAILED, WORKFLOW_CANCELLED.

topics.name: flowos.task.events
topics.description: Lifecycle events for tasks: TASK_CREATED, TASK_ASSIGNED, TASK_ACCEPTED, TASK_STARTED, TASK_UPDATED, TASK_CHECKPOINTED, TASK_COMPLETED, TASK_FAILED, TASK_REVERT_REQUESTED, TASK_HANDOFF_REQUESTED, TASK_HANDOFF_ACCEPTED.

topics.name: flowos.agent.events
topics.description: Agent registration and status events: AGENT_REGISTERED, AGENT_ONLINE, AGENT_OFFLINE, AGENT_BUSY, AGENT_IDLE, AGENT_CAPABILITY_UPDATED.

topics.name: flowos.build.events
topics.description: Build and execution events: BUILD_TRIGGERED, BUILD_STARTED, BUILD_SUCCEEDED, BUILD_FAILED, TEST_STARTED, TEST_FINISHED, TEST_PASSED, TEST_FAILED, ARTIFACT_UPLOADED.

topics.name: flowos.ai.events
topics.description: AI reasoning and suggestion events: AI_TASK_STARTED, AI_SUGGESTION_CREATED, AI_PATCH_PROPOSED, AI_REVIEW_COMPLETED, AI_REASONING_TRACE, AI_TOOL_CALLED.

topics.name: flowos.workspace.events
topics.description: Workspace and Git state events: WORKSPACE_CREATED, WORKSPACE_SYNCED, CHECKPOINT_CREATED, CHECKPOINT_REVERTED, BRANCH_CREATED, HANDOFF_PREPARED, SNAPSHOT_CREATED.

topics.name: flowos.policy.events
topics.description: Policy engine events: POLICY_EVALUATED, POLICY_VIOLATION_DETECTED, APPROVAL_REQUESTED, APPROVAL_GRANTED, APPROVAL_DENIED, BRANCH_PROTECTION_TRIGGERED.

topics.name: flowos.observability.events
topics.description: Observability and metrics events: METRIC_RECORDED, TRACE_SPAN_STARTED, TRACE_SPAN_ENDED, HEALTH_CHECK_RESULT, SYSTEM_ALERT. Used by the UI real-time feed and monitoring systems.

consumer_groups._comment: Defined consumer groups and their topic subscriptions for documentation purposes.

flowos-orchestrator.description: Temporal workflow orchestrator — consumes all event topics to drive workflow state transitions.

flowos-api.description: REST API server — consumes events to update metadata store and serve real-time state.

flowos-ui-stream.description: UI WebSocket/SSE bridge — tails all topics to push real-time updates to connected browsers.

flowos-policy-engine.description: Policy engine — evaluates task and workflow events against RBAC rules and approval gates.

flowos-observability.description: Observability layer — captures all events for metrics, tracing, and replay.
